title: [migrate] V16 batch cleanup 532k m_parent_id orphans
description:
## Konteks
Plan: section 5.2 & 4.1 (V16). **532,969 orphan** `mail.m_parent_id` rows. Tidak boleh `UPDATE ... WHERE NOT IN (...)` langsung — bisa lock table 30+ menit. Pakai stored procedure batch.

## Tabel target
- `mail` (1.8M rows, 532k orphan parent ID)

## Pre-flight check
```sql
SELECT COUNT(*) AS orphan FROM mail
WHERE m_parent_id IS NOT NULL
  AND m_parent_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM (SELECT m_id FROM mail) x);
-- Expected ~532,969
```

## SQL DDL — Flyway V16

File: `src/main/resources/db/migration/V16__mail_parent_id_orphan_cleanup_batch.sql`

```sql
DELIMITER $$

CREATE PROCEDURE cleanup_mail_parent_orphans()
BEGIN
  DECLARE done INT DEFAULT 0;
  DECLARE total INT DEFAULT 0;
  DECLARE iter INT DEFAULT 0;

  REPEAT
    SET iter = iter + 1;

    UPDATE mail
      SET m_parent_id = NULL
      WHERE m_parent_id IS NOT NULL
        AND m_parent_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM (SELECT m_id FROM mail) x)
      LIMIT 10000;

    SET total = total + ROW_COUNT();
    SET done = (ROW_COUNT() = 0);

    SELECT CONCAT('Iteration ', iter, ': total cleaned ', total) AS progress;
  UNTIL done END REPEAT;
END$$

DELIMITER ;

CALL cleanup_mail_parent_orphans();

DROP PROCEDURE cleanup_mail_parent_orphans;
```

**Estimasi durasi:** 532k / 10k = 54 iter × 1-3 detik = ~3 menit. Verifikasi di staging.

## Entity diff
Tidak ada — pure DB cleanup.

## Files yang harus diaudit
Tidak ada code change.

## Langkah pengerjaan
1. Pre-flight: konfirmasi orphan count.
2. Backup CRITICAL: `CREATE TABLE mail_parent_backup_20260504 AS SELECT m_id, m_parent_id FROM mail WHERE m_parent_id IS NOT NULL;` (kompak, hanya 2 kolom)
3. Buat Flyway V16.
4. Run di staging, **catat durasi total** dan **tail output progress**.
5. Verifikasi: `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mail WHERE m_parent_id IS NOT NULL AND m_parent_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);` → 0
6. Production: jalankan di **maintenance window** untuk safety, walaupun batch.

## Rollback
```sql
-- Restore m_parent_id dari backup table
UPDATE mail m
JOIN mail_parent_backup_20260504 b ON m.m_id = b.m_id
SET m.m_parent_id = b.m_parent_id;
```

## Risk catatan
- **HIGH risk** karena volume data. Walaupun batch, total runtime menyentuh tabel 1.8M.
- Flyway timeout default kadang trip — consider running stored procedure manual via `mariadb` CLI lalu mark Flyway success dengan `flyway baseline` jika perlu.
- Alternative: pisahkan jadi script manual + Flyway repeatable migration yang verify saja.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Pre-flight: ~532,969 orphan
- [ ] Backup `mail_parent_backup_20260504` ada
- [ ] V16 apply clean (atau procedure di-run manual sukses)
- [ ] Post-check: 0 orphan `m_parent_id`
- [ ] Durasi production di-log untuk maintenance window planning

## Blocked by
- bd V15 — sequential; V15 harus selesai dulu (audit column + master cleanup)

title: Fix MailArchiveNotifLogRepository.findByArchiveId property mismatch
description:
Spring Data JPA gagal membuat query untuk method MailArchiveNotifLogRepository.findByArchiveId(Long) — entity MailArchiveNotifLog tidak punya properti 'archiveId'. Kemungkinan namanya 'mailArchiveId' (kolom mail_archive_id).

Dampak: Spring context refresh gagal saat bootRun setelah Flyway migrate sukses.

Usulan fix: rename method jadi findByMailArchiveId(Long mailArchiveId), atau verifikasi nama properti pada entity MailArchiveNotifLog dan sesuaikan derived query.

Verifikasi: ./gradlew bootRun → 'Started MailApplication' di log.

title: Resolve duplicate MailArchiveNotifQueryRepository bean conflict
description:
Dua kelas dengan FQCN-nama-pendek sama menyebabkan ConflictingBeanDefinitionException sehingga Spring context gagal refresh dan Flyway tidak pernah jalan saat bootRun.

Lokasi:
- src/main/java/id/perumdamts/mail/repository/core/jooq/MailArchiveNotifQueryRepository.java (DIPAKAI oleh service.core.archive.MailArchiveNotifQueryService)
- src/main/java/id/perumdamts/mail/repository/archive/jooq/MailArchiveNotifQueryRepository.java (ORPHAN, tidak ada konsumen)

title: Fix V1 baseline mail_archive_notif columns mismatch with legacy
description: V1__baseline_schema.sql:202-213 mendefinisikan mail_archive_notif dengan kolom (user_id, notif_date, status) yang TIDAK ADA di legacy DB (smartoffice@192.168.230.84:3307). Legacy sebenarnya: id INT, mail_archive_id INT, notif_flag INT, insert_date DATETIME, processed_date DATETIME (40.922 baris, semua terisi, notif_flag=1, insert_date<processed_date — queue notifikasi). Entity MailArchiveNotif.java sudah benar selaras legacy. Perbaikan: ubah V1 baseline agar kolomnya (mail_archive_id BIGINT NOT NULL, notif_flag INT, insert_date DATETIME, processed_date DATETIME, updated_at DATETIME) — promote mail_archive_id ke BIGINT untuk konsisten dengan mail_archive.ma_id BIGINT (memory flyway-squash-2026-05-09). Pertahankan FK fk_archive_notif_archive dan index. Tabel mail_archive_notif_log tetap (legacy memang punya user_id+notif_date).
acceptance_criteria: V1 baseline mail_archive_notif kolom selaras legacy + entity; mail_archive_id tetap BIGINT; FK + index tetap; entity tidak diubah; dokumen PRD/CONTEXT/memory di-update
close_reason: V1 baseline mail_archive_notif diselaraskan dengan legacy: kolom user_id/notif_date/status dihapus, ditambahkan notif_flag/insert_date/processed_date; mail_archive_id BIGINT NOT NULL; FK + index dipertahankan. Entity tidak diubah. CONTEXT.md diperbarui (catatan koreksi schema). Memory bd disimpan dengan key mail-archive-notif-schema-ground-truth.

title: Fix ArchivePublishedEventListener: wrong table + missing pos->user fan-out
description:
ArchivePublishedEventListener.onArchivePublished() salah implementasi.

ACTUAL FLOW (clarified by user):
1. User buat arsip -> save mail_archive (status DRAFT=1 atau ARCHIVED=2).
2. User pilih pos_id list -> save mail_archive_access (mail_archive_id, pos_id, access, download, history).
3. ArchivePublishedEvent fired (status -> ARCHIVED=2).
4. Listener: untuk setiap pos_id di mail_archive_access (skip access='0'):
   a. Fetch pegawai by pos_id (HrServiceClient atau JOIN employee WHERE emp_pos_id=pos_id) -> dapat list user_id.
   b. INSERT BATCH ke mail_archive_notif_log (mail_archive_id, user_id, notif_date=NOW()).
5. UPSERT mail_archive_notif (mail_archive_id, notif_flag=1, processed_date=NOW()) sebagai per-archive marker.

BUGS DI CODE SAAT INI:
- BUG 1: Insert ke mail_archive_notif dengan kolom user_id. Schema legacy mail_archive_notif TIDAK punya kolom user_id (cols: id, mail_archive_id, notif_flag, insert_date, processed_date).
- BUG 2: Loop pakai positionId langsung sebagai user_id (tanpa resolve pos -> employee).
- BUG 3: Tidak insert ke mail_archive_notif_log (yg memang untuk fan-out per-user; legacy 336k row di sini).
- BUG 4: ArchivePublishedEvent.accessPositionIds masih pakai List<Integer> dari pos_id mentah; perlu skip yg access='0' di publisher (atau di listener).

ACCEPTANCE:
- Listener fetch user_id from pegawai by pos_id (avg ~9 user/archive di legacy).
- Listener INSERT batch ke mail_archive_notif_log per (archive, user).
- Listener UPSERT mail_archive_notif sebagai marker (1 row per archive).
- Skip pos_id dengan access='0' (view-forbidden).
- Test: ArchivePublishedEventListenerTest verifikasi target table + shape.

CONSTRAINT: tidak boleh ubah schema mail_archive_notif/log/access (V31/V32 FK already done).

title: Numbering: implementasi placeholder #type# dan #MR# tidak sesuai data legacy
description:
Verifikasi terhadap data legacy 2025 menemukan 2 placeholder yang implementasinya salah di AbstractMailNumberGenerator.generate() (src/main/java/id/perumdamts/mail/service/core/mail/numbering/AbstractMailNumberGenerator.java:37-43).

## Bukti dari data legacy

Template tenant BMS: `#seq#/#org_code#/#m_cat#-#type#/#MR#/#YYYY#`

Sample m_no actual:
- m_type=1 (Internal): `22460/00/485.1-I/X/2025` — #type#=I, #MR#=X (Oktober)
- m_type=2 (Masuk): `049/1421002/SEKRE-M/VII/2025-690` — #type#=M, #MR#=VII (Juli)
- m_type=3 (Keluar): expected K

## Mismatch implementasi existing

1. `#MR#` di-replace dengan literal string "MR". Seharusnya = roman of MONTH(m_created_date) (I-XII). Kode existing baris 41: .replace("#MR#", "MR")
2. `#type#` TIDAK ADA di method generate() sama sekali. Placeholder ini ter-leftover di hasil akhir.

## Yang harus dilakukan

- [ ] Tambahkan method roman conversion (1=I, ..., 12=XII)
- [ ] Tambahkan substitusi #MR# = romanOfMonth(mail.getCreatedDate())
- [ ] Tambahkan substitusi #type# = mail.getMailType().getName().substring(0,1).toUpperCase()
- [ ] Pastikan mail.getMailType() di-load (LAZY hint atau JOIN FETCH di Mail repo)
- [ ] Update existing unit test atau tambah test baru untuk verifikasi format akhir match data legacy

## Konfirmasi user (grilling Q35)

User memilih opsi A: implementasi sesuai data legacy (huruf pertama nama MailType + roman of month). Tidak menambah field code di MailType, tidak konfigurable via sys_reference.
close_reason: Verified implementation of #type# and #MR# placeholders in AbstractMailNumberGenerator. Fixed BmsMailNumberGenerator format reference code to match database migration (m_number_format_bms). Confirmed MailRepository uses JOIN FETCH for mailType and mailCategory.

title: Numbering Mail & MailArchive tidak sesuai data legacy — perlu refactor
description:
Investigasi dari grilling Q22-Q24 menemukan 4 ketidaksesuaian antara implementasi numbering existing dan data legacy SmartOffice (40k mail_archive + 1.8M mail).

## 1. AbstractMailNumberGenerator.getNextSequence — SALAH SCOPE
File: src/main/java/id/perumdamts/mail/service/core/mail/numbering/AbstractMailNumberGenerator.java:65-79
Saat ini: COUNT(*) dari mail WHERE m_status=1 AND m_category=X AND YEAR(m_created_date)=Y
- Pakai m_status=1 (data legacy: 99.2% baris m_status=1; status=1 BUKAN 'aktif' tapi soft-delete-like default).
- Filter per m_category → seq di-reset per kategori. Belum diverifikasi apakah Mail m_no benar per-kategori atau global.
- Pakai COUNT(*) bukan MAX(seq) — kalau ada gap karena delete, COUNT undercount → tabrakan nomor.

## 2. DefaultArchiveNumberGenerator.getNextSequence — SALAH 3 hal
File: src/main/java/id/perumdamts/mail/service/core/archive/numbering/DefaultArchiveNumberGenerator.java:56-64
- ma_status=2 dipakai sebagai filter; data: status 2=37.559 (mayoritas), 1=2.188, 3=145, NULL=1. Lifecycle DRAFT→ARCHIVED→DELETED kemungkinan map ke 1→2→3 — perlu konfirmasi. Filter status menyebabkan seq lompat saat draft di-promote.
- Filter per ma_mcat_id → seq di-reset per kategori. Data legacy MEMBUKTIKAN seq global per tahun per POLA (bukti: pola short di 2025 urut 1506→1504→1503→1502→1501 lintas kategori 800/841.5/015/027/692.1).
- TIDAK ada SELECT … FOR UPDATE → race condition saat 2 admin arsip bersamaan → duplicate ma_no.
- TIDAK menangani 2 pola koeksis (short vs long with roman). Template tunggal di sys_reference tidak cukup.

## 3. ArchiveNumberGenerator interface tunggal
File: src/main/java/id/perumdamts/mail/service/core/archive/numbering/ArchiveNumberGenerator.java
Tidak ada delegator/strategy seperti MailNumberGeneratorDelegator (Default/BMS/SMD/BPN). Untuk arsip butuh: pilihan pola manual oleh admin saat arsip (short atau long), bukan static template global.

## 4. Format ma_no legacy
- Pola A: <ma_mcat_code>/<seq>/<year>  contoh 027/1524/2025  (~62%)
- Pola B: <ma_mcat_code>/<roman>/<seq>/<year>  contoh 692.1/I/0406/2025  (~37%)
- Roman = bulan I-XII pada Pola B
- Seq global per tahun per pola, bukan per kategori

## Yang harus dilakukan
- [ ] Verifikasi scope seq di Mail m_no (per-kategori vs global) dari sample legacy
- [ ] Refactor AbstractMailNumberGenerator: ganti COUNT→MAX(parsed_seq), tinjau ulang m_status filter, konfirmasi scope per-kategori
- [ ] Refactor DefaultArchiveNumberGenerator → ganti dengan strategy pattern: 2 generator (ShortPattern, LongPatternWithRoman), pilihan pola via parameter request, sequence storage via tabel counter (mail_archive_seq: year, pattern, last_seq) dengan SELECT FOR UPDATE
- [ ] Backfill counter saat migrasi: SELECT MAX(parsed_seq) per (year,pattern) FROM mail_archive
- [ ] Update CONTEXT.md untuk merefleksikan rule sebenarnya
- [ ] Tambah unit test parser ma_no (validasi 2 pola)

title: [migrate] V23 attachments composite PK->single + FK download_history
description:
## Konteks
Plan: section 4.6 & 5 (V23). `attachments` legacy punya **composite PK `(id, upload_date)`** — entity pakai single PK `id`. Perlu drop composite PK setelah verifikasi tidak ada duplikat. Juga: cleanup orphan attachment_download_history + FK.

> **CRITICAL DEPENDENCY:** OQ-1 (issue #2) harus RESOLVED dulu — kalau ada duplikat `attachments.id`, V23 strategy berubah jadi `@IdClass` (composite PK tetap).

## Tabel target
- `attachments` (5,088,036 rows) — terbesar di project!
- `attachment_download_history` (511,287 rows)

## Pre-flight check (BLOCKER)
```sql
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
  SELECT id FROM attachments GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) x;
-- HARUS 0 untuk lanjut single-PK strategy

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attachment_download_history
WHERE attachment_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM attachments);
-- Expected ~1,677
```

## SQL DDL — Flyway V23

File: `src/main/resources/db/migration/V23__attachments_drop_composite_pk_and_dl_history_fk.sql`

```sql
-- Backup CRITICAL (5M rows — gunakan mariadb-dump untuk efisiensi)
-- CLI: mariadb-dump smartoffice attachments > attachments_backup_20260504.sql

-- Step 1: drop composite PK + add single PK
ALTER TABLE attachments
  DROP PRIMARY KEY,
  ADD PRIMARY KEY (id);

-- Step 2: optional CHECK constraint untuk ref_type (skip FK karena polymorphic)
ALTER TABLE attachments
  ADD CONSTRAINT chk_ref_type CHECK (ref_type IN (1, 2));

-- Step 3: cleanup attachment_download_history orphan
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS adh_orphan_backup_20260504 AS
SELECT * FROM attachment_download_history
WHERE attachment_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM attachments);

DELETE FROM attachment_download_history
WHERE attachment_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM attachments);

-- Step 4: FK
ALTER TABLE attachment_download_history
  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_dlhist_attachment
    FOREIGN KEY (attachment_id) REFERENCES attachments(id)
    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;
```

> ⚠️ ALTER TABLE 5M rows untuk DROP/ADD PRIMARY KEY = berat. Estimasi 30-90 menit. Gunakan maintenance window. Pertimbangkan `pt-online-schema-change` (Percona) untuk zero-downtime.

## Entity diff
File: `entity/core/Attachment.java`

Pastikan PK single:
```java
@Id
@Column(name = "id")
private Long id;
```

Drop kalau ada `@IdClass`/`@EmbeddedId` lama.

## Files yang harus diaudit
- `entity/core/Attachment.java`
- `entity/core/AttachmentDownloadHistory.java`
- `repository/.../jpa/AttachmentRepository.java` — `findById(Long id)` (single param)
- `repository/.../jooq/attachment/*`
- `service/.../AttachmentCommandService`, `AttachmentQueryService`
- `service/.../AttachmentFileStorageService`
- `dto/attachment/*`
- Test fixture

## Langkah pengerjaan
1. **WAJIB:** OQ-1 (issue #2) RESOLVED dulu. Jika duplikat ditemukan → buka issue baru, V23 strategy ganti.
2. **Backup CRITICAL:** dump `attachments` table — ini 5M rows.
   ```bash
   mariadb-dump -u root -p smartoffice attachments > attachments_backup_20260504.sql
   ```
3. Buat Flyway V23.
4. Run di staging, **monitor durasi**.
5. Verifikasi: `SHOW INDEX FROM attachments` — PK hanya `id`.
6. Update entity: drop `@IdClass` jika ada, pastikan `@Id` di field `id` saja.
7. Regen JOOQ.
8. Run full test: `./gradlew test`.
9. Smoke test upload/download/list/delete attachment.

## Rollback
```sql
ALTER TABLE attachments DROP PRIMARY KEY, ADD PRIMARY KEY (id, upload_date);
ALTER TABLE attachment_download_history DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_dlhist_attachment;
INSERT INTO attachment_download_history SELECT * FROM adh_orphan_backup_20260504;
```

Atau restore total dari `attachments_backup_20260504.sql`.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] OQ-1 RESOLVED (0 duplikat)
- [ ] Backup attachments ada (full dump)
- [ ] V23 apply clean
- [ ] PK single `id`
- [ ] FK `fk_dlhist_attachment` ada
- [ ] 1,677 download history orphan deleted
- [ ] Full regression test pass
- [ ] Smoke test upload/download OK
- [ ] Durasi production dilog untuk maintenance window

## Blocked by
- bd #2 (OQ-1: attachments.id duplikat verification) → btt

title: [migrate] V17 mail FK + indexes
description:
## Konteks
Plan: section 4.1 & 5 (V17). Tambahkan 4 FK + 2 index pada tabel `mail` setelah cleanup di V15+V16.

## Tabel target
- `mail` (1.8M rows)

## Pre-flight check (WAJIB lulus semua)
```sql
SELECT 'm_type orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) FROM mail
  WHERE m_type IS NOT NULL AND m_type NOT IN (SELECT mail_type_id FROM mail_type);
SELECT 'm_category orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) FROM mail
  WHERE m_category IS NOT NULL AND m_category NOT IN (SELECT mcat_id FROM mail_category);
SELECT 'm_root_id orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) FROM mail
  WHERE m_root_id IS NOT NULL AND m_root_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);
SELECT 'm_parent_id orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) FROM mail
  WHERE m_parent_id IS NOT NULL AND m_parent_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);
-- SEMUA harus 0
```

Jika ada yang > 0 → STOP. V15/V16 belum komplit.

## SQL DDL — Flyway V17

File: `src/main/resources/db/migration/V17__mail_foreign_keys.sql`

```sql
ALTER TABLE mail
  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_mail_type
    FOREIGN KEY (m_type) REFERENCES mail_type(mail_type_id)
    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,

  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_mail_category
    FOREIGN KEY (m_category) REFERENCES mail_category(mcat_id)
    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,

  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_mail_root
    FOREIGN KEY (m_root_id) REFERENCES mail(m_id)
    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,

  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_mail_parent
    FOREIGN KEY (m_parent_id) REFERENCES mail(m_id)
    ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE;

-- Indexes (pengganti partition di plan)
CREATE INDEX idx_mail_status_date ON mail(m_status, m_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_mail_created_by_date ON mail(m_created_by, m_created_date);
```

> Hati-hati: ALTER TABLE 1.8M rows untuk 4 FK + 2 index bisa lama (15-60 menit). Pakai maintenance window. Pertimbangkan `ALGORITHM=INPLACE`.

## Entity diff
Tidak ada change struktur. Optional: tambah `@JoinColumn` relationship kalau memang butuh fetch object.

Catatan: jika entity `Mail` sudah punya field `Integer parentId` / `parentId Long` simple, biarkan (tidak harus ManyToOne).

## Files yang harus diaudit
- Tidak ada change wajib di Java.
- Verifikasi tidak ada test/service yang `INSERT mail` tanpa valid foreign key (bisa fail setelah FK dipasang).

## Langkah pengerjaan
1. Pre-flight: WAJIB semua 0.
2. Buat Flyway V17.
3. Run di staging, **monitor durasi** + lock log.
4. Verifikasi FK + index ada via `information_schema`.
5. Run full test suite — pastikan tidak ada test create mail dengan `m_type` yang tidak ada di mail_type, dll.
6. Production maintenance window.

## Rollback
```sql
ALTER TABLE mail
  DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_mail_type,
  DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_mail_category,
  DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_mail_root,
  DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_mail_parent;
DROP INDEX idx_mail_status_date ON mail;
DROP INDEX idx_mail_created_by_date ON mail;
```

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Pre-flight: semua orphan count = 0
- [ ] V17 apply clean
- [ ] 4 FK ada di information_schema
- [ ] 2 index ada
- [ ] Full test pass
- [ ] Smoke test send mail (insert path) OK
- [ ] Durasi production dilog

## Blocked by
- bd V16 (parent cleanup) — sequential

title: [migrate] V15 mail.m_updated_date + cleanup orphan masters
description:
## Konteks
Plan: section 4.1 & 5 (V15). Tabel `mail` (1.8M rows) butuh:
1. ADD `m_updated_date` (entity sudah punya field tapi DB belum)
2. Cleanup orphan FK pre-condition: `m_type`, `m_category`, `m_root_id`
3. Sesuaikan length kolom entity dengan legacy

V15 **tidak** cleanup `m_parent_id` — itu di V16 (532k rows, butuh batch).
V15 **tidak** tambah FK — itu di V17.

## Tabel target
- `mail` (1,805,122 rows)
- `mail_type` (3 rows), `mail_category` (596 rows)

## Pre-flight check
Sudah dijalankan di issue #1 (preflight). Konfirmasi orphan count:
```sql
SELECT 'm_type orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) FROM mail
  WHERE m_type IS NOT NULL AND m_type NOT IN (SELECT mail_type_id FROM mail_type);  -- ~549
SELECT 'm_category orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) FROM mail
  WHERE m_category IS NOT NULL AND m_category NOT IN (SELECT mcat_id FROM mail_category);  -- ~691
SELECT 'm_root_id orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) FROM mail
  WHERE m_root_id IS NOT NULL AND m_root_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);  -- ~14
```

## SQL DDL — Flyway V15

File: `src/main/resources/db/migration/V15__mail_audit_column_and_master_fk_cleanup.sql`

```sql
-- Step 1: tambah kolom audit
ALTER TABLE mail
  ADD COLUMN m_updated_date DATETIME NULL AFTER m_created_date;

UPDATE mail SET m_updated_date = m_created_date WHERE m_updated_date IS NULL;

-- Step 2: cleanup orphan SET NULL (relatif kecil, satu shot OK)
UPDATE mail SET m_type = NULL
  WHERE m_type IS NOT NULL
    AND m_type NOT IN (SELECT mail_type_id FROM mail_type);

UPDATE mail SET m_category = NULL
  WHERE m_category IS NOT NULL
    AND m_category NOT IN (SELECT mcat_id FROM mail_category);

UPDATE mail SET m_root_id = NULL
  WHERE m_root_id IS NOT NULL
    AND m_root_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM (SELECT m_id FROM mail) x);
```

> **Catatan ALGORITHM:** untuk mail 1.8M, ALTER TABLE butuh space. Pakai `ALGORITHM=INPLACE, LOCK=NONE` jika MariaDB versi mendukung:
> ```sql
> ALTER TABLE mail ADD COLUMN m_updated_date DATETIME NULL AFTER m_created_date,
>   ALGORITHM=INPLACE, LOCK=NONE;
> ```

## Entity diff
File: `entity/core/Mail.java`

| Field | Sebelum | Sesudah |
|---|---|---|
| `mailNumber` (`m_no`) | `length=100` | **`length=64`** |
| `noSuratMasuk` (`m_no_surat_masuk`) | `length=100` | **`length=64`** |
| `asalSuratMasuk` (`m_asal_surat_masuk`) | `length=200` | **`length=128`** |
| `tujuanSuratKeluar` | `length=200` | **`length=128`** |
| `penerimaSuratKeluar` | `length=200` | **`length=128`** |
| `tglSuratMasuk` | `String length=50` | **`LocalDate`**, drop length |
| `updatedDate` | (sudah ada di entity) | map ke `m_updated_date` |

```diff
- @Column(name = "m_no", length = 100)
+ @Column(name = "m_no", length = 64)

- @Column(name = "m_tgl_surat_masuk", length = 50)
- private String tglSuratMasuk;
+ @Column(name = "m_tgl_surat_masuk")
+ private LocalDate tglSuratMasuk;

+ @UpdateTimestamp
+ @Column(name = "m_updated_date")
+ private LocalDateTime updatedDate;
```

### Field deprecated (legacy column tetap ada, tidak di-map)
Tambah Javadoc:
```java
/**
 * @deprecated Legacy column from SmartOffice — `m_rab_id`, `m_ma_id`.
 * Tidak dipakai di mail-service. Dibiarkan exist di DB untuk backward compat.
 */
```

## Files yang harus diaudit
- `entity/core/Mail.java`
- `dto/.../MailRequest|Response|Update*` — pastikan `@Size(max=..)` updated; `tglSuratMasuk` jadi `LocalDate` (DTO + JSON serialization)
- `repository/.../jooq/mail/*` — verifikasi compile setelah JOOQ regen (kolom baru `M_UPDATED_DATE`)
- `service/.../Mail*Service` — handle parsing `LocalDate` instead of `String`
- `mapper/MailMapper` (MapStruct)
- Test fixture: ubah hardcoded String date → `LocalDate.parse(...)`

## Langkah pengerjaan
1. Backup: `CREATE TABLE mail_backup_20260504 AS SELECT * FROM mail;` (~1.8M rows, butuh ~2GB)
   - Alternative: `mariadb-dump smartoffice mail > mail_backup_20260504.sql`
2. Buat Flyway V15.
3. Run di staging, monitor durasi (estimasi 10-30 menit untuk ALTER + UPDATE).
4. Update entity Mail (length, LocalDate, updatedDate).
5. Regen JOOQ.
6. Update DTO + mapper.
7. Run full test: `./gradlew test`.
8. Smoke test create/list/detail mail.

## Rollback
```sql
ALTER TABLE mail DROP COLUMN m_updated_date;
-- UPDATE orphan tidak bisa di-undo tanpa backup → restore dari mail_backup_20260504
```

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Pre-flight match expected orphan counts
- [ ] Backup ada
- [ ] V15 apply clean
- [ ] `m_updated_date` populated dari `m_created_date`
- [ ] Orphan m_type/m_category/m_root_id = 0 setelah migration

title: [migrate] V20 mail_archive align legacy columns + indexes + FK

description:

Plan: `plan/24-entity-legacy-alignment-and-fk-introduction.md` section 10.

Lima open questions harus dijawab sebelum migrasi tertentu jalan. Investigate via query DB; untuk yang tidak bisa dijawab via query (OQ-5), flag eksplisit sebagai blocker maintenance window.

## Yang harus diinvestigate

### OQ-1: Apakah `attachments.id` ada duplikat? (BLOCKER V23)
```sql
SELECT id, COUNT(*) c FROM attachments GROUP BY id HAVING c > 1 LIMIT 20;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) AS unique_ids, COUNT(*) AS total_rows FROM attachments;
```
- Jika 0 duplikat → V23 boleh `DROP PRIMARY KEY, ADD PRIMARY KEY (id)`
- Jika ada → V23 harus pakai `@IdClass` (composite PK tetap)

### OQ-2: Apakah `mail_archive.ma_ref_id` selalu = `mail.m_id`?
```sql
SHOW COLUMNS FROM mail_archive LIKE 'ma_ref%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mail_archive WHERE ma_ref_id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mail_archive
  WHERE ma_ref_id IS NOT NULL AND ma_ref_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);
```
- Hasil menentukan apakah V20 boleh tambah FK `ma_ref_id → mail.m_id`

### OQ-3: `mail_org_statistic.created_by_org` = organization_id?
```sql
SHOW CREATE TABLE mail_org_statistic;
SELECT created_by_org, COUNT(*) FROM mail_org_statistic
  GROUP BY created_by_org ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 10;
SHOW TABLES LIKE '%org%';
```
- Hasil menentukan FK target di entity baru `MailOrgStatistic`

### OQ-4: `msg_template` vs `pesan_singkat` overlap?
```sql
SHOW CREATE TABLE msg_template;
SHOW CREATE TABLE pesan_singkat;
SELECT * FROM msg_template LIMIT 5;
SELECT * FROM pesan_singkat LIMIT 5;
```
- Jika overlap → consolidate jadi 1 entity. Jika beda → 2 entity.

### OQ-5: SmartOffice masih write paralel ke DB?
- Cek log MariaDB `general_log` untuk koneksi non-mail-service
- Wawancara Product/Ops jika perlu — flag sebagai BLOCKED kalau belum bisa dijawab
- Hasil menentukan apakah ALTER agresif boleh atau harus pakai shadow table

title: [migrate] Pre-flight verification script V15..V30
description:
## Konteks
Plan: `plan/24-entity-legacy-alignment-and-fk-introduction.md` section 5.1.

Migrasi V15..V30 menyentuh tabel besar (mail 1.8M, mail_recipient 2.2M, attachments 5M, sys_user_task 4M). Sebelum **issue migrasi mana pun** dijalankan, harus ada script preflight yang memvalidasi asumsi di plan masih benar di DB target.

## Yang harus dibuat

File baru: `scripts/preflight_v15_v30.sql`

Script harus print laporan dengan label + count untuk setiap check:

```sql
-- 1. Duplikat attachments.id (blocker untuk V23)
SELECT 'attachments.id duplicates' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM (SELECT id FROM attachments GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) x;

-- 2. pos_id non-numeric di mail_archive_access (blocker untuk V21)
SELECT 'mail_archive_access.pos_id non-numeric' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM mail_archive_access
WHERE pos_id NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND pos_id IS NOT NULL AND pos_id <> '';

-- 3. Duplikat (mail_id, user_id) di mail_recipient (blocker untuk V19)
SELECT 'mail_recipient (mail_id,user_id) duplicates' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM (SELECT mail_id, user_id FROM mail_recipient
      GROUP BY mail_id, user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) x;

-- 4. Snapshot orphan count
SELECT 'mail.m_type orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM mail WHERE m_type IS NOT NULL
    AND m_type NOT IN (SELECT mail_type_id FROM mail_type);
SELECT 'mail.m_category orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM mail WHERE m_category IS NOT NULL
    AND m_category NOT IN (SELECT mcat_id FROM mail_category);
SELECT 'mail.m_root_id orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM mail WHERE m_root_id IS NOT NULL
    AND m_root_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);
SELECT 'mail.m_parent_id orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM mail WHERE m_parent_id IS NOT NULL
    AND m_parent_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);
SELECT 'mail_recipient.mail_id orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM mail_recipient WHERE mail_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);
SELECT 'sys_user_task.tm_id orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM sys_user_task WHERE tm_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);
SELECT 'print_log.mail_id orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM print_log WHERE mail_id IS NOT NULL
    AND mail_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);
SELECT 'attachment_download_history.attachment_id orphan' AS label, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM attachment_download_history
    WHERE attachment_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM attachments);

-- 5. Engine verification
SELECT 'pesan_singkat engine' AS label, ENGINE AS info
  FROM information_schema.TABLES
  WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'pesan_singkat';
```

## Langkah pengerjaan (junior dev / AI lokal)

1. Buat folder `scripts/` di root mail-service kalau belum ada.
2. Tulis `scripts/preflight_v15_v30.sql` dengan SQL di atas.
3. Tambahkan `scripts/README.md` yang menjelaskan:
   - Cara run: `mariadb -u root -p smartoffice < scripts/preflight_v15_v30.sql`
   - Interpretasi hasil per row (label → arti → tindakan kalau cnt > 0)
4. Run script di staging clone DB → simpan output ke `scripts/preflight_v15_v30.sample-output.txt`.
5. Catat insight penting via `bd remember` (mis. "attachments.id has N duplicates").

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] File `scripts/preflight_v15_v30.sql` ada
- [ ] Bisa dijalankan: `mariadb -u root -p smartoffice < scripts/preflight_v15_v30.sql`
- [ ] Output mencakup minimal 12 row hasil check (point 1-5)
- [ ] `scripts/README.md` menjelaskan cara run + interpretasi hasil
- [ ] Script read-only (tidak ada ALTER/DELETE/UPDATE)

title: Replace RateLimitService with SignatureVerificationThrottle (Redis-backed, fix Bucket4j deprecation)
description: RateLimitService di service/security/ adalah shallow pass-through: interface (resolveBucket(String)->Bucket) lebih lebar dari kebutuhan caller (controller cuma chain .tryConsume(1)). Bucket4j 8.10.1 API yang dipakai (Bandwidth.classic + Refill.intervally) sudah deprecated, dan ConcurrentHashMap<String,Bucket> tidak pernah evict (memory leak per IP). Ganti dengan SignatureVerificationThrottle.allow(clientIp)->boolean: Redis-backed via Bucket4j Lettuce (proxyManager pakai LettuceConnectionFactory yang sudah ada), Bandwidth.builder().capacity(c).refillIntervally(c, d) (preserve behavior), key 'rate-limit:verify-sign:{ip}', fail-open kalau Redis error. Properties app.rate-limit.verify-sign.* tidak berubah. MailSignatureController:46 jadi 'if (!throttle.allow(ip))'. Tests pakai @MockBean throttle scripted boolean (tidak perlu Bucket4j real).
design: Add deps bucket4j_jdk17-lettuce + bucket4j_jdk17-redis-common 8.10.1. RateLimitConfig @Bean ProxyManager<String> dari LettuceConnectionFactory (reuse koneksi Spring, bukan RedisClient.create baru). expirationAfterWrite=basedOnTimeForRefillingBucketUpToMax(duration). BucketConfiguration di-build sekali (singleton) dari @Value capacity & duration. Throttle pakai proxyManager.builder().build(key, ()->cfg).tryConsume(1) di try/catch, catch Exception->return true (fail-open). Drop bucket4j-core dari build.gradle (transitive).
acceptance_criteria: (1) RateLimitService.java dihapus, ganti SignatureVerificationThrottle.java dengan API allow(String)->boolean. (2) Bucket4j 8.10.1 non-deprecated API (Bandwidth.builder()). (3) Redis-backed via Bucket4j Lettuce ProxyManager, key prefix 'rate-limit:verify-sign:'. (4) Fail-open on Redis error. (5) MailSignatureController & test tidak lagi import Bucket4j. (6) Properties app.rate-limit.verify-sign.capacity & .duration tetap work. (7) Behavior unchanged: refillIntervally semantics.

title: PRD: Migrasi Mail/Disposisi Legacy → Mail Service (Konsolidasi 4 Branch Grilling)
description:
# PRD: Migrasi Mail/Disposisi Legacy → Mail Service (Konsolidasi 4 Branch Grilling)

> Bilingual ID/EN. Hard constraint: **NO backend schema change** ke 4 tabel inti
> (`mail`, `mail_recipient`, `user_task`, `mail_folder`, `print_log`,
> `mail_respontime`). FE boleh rename via ACL. Migrasi 1.8M mail + 40k arsip
> + 95k print_log + 2.24M recipient harus aman.

## Problem Statement

User PERUMDA TS pakai aplikasi legacy SmartOffice (PHP, DB
`smartoffice@192.168.230.84:3307`) untuk surat masuk/keluar + disposisi
internal. Aplikasi legacy:

- Tidak punya flag "selesai" eksplisit untuk disposisi (status emergent dari
  tree traversal, sering bingung "ini sudah ditangani atau belum").
- Personal folder ada, tapi UI legacy tidak validasi depth, tidak block
  delete kalau berisi → user bisa hilangkan akses ke mail-nya sendiri.
- Tidak ada role-switcher; tapi user yang dimutasi/promosi bingung apakah
  posisi history-nya tetap, atau mengikuti mutasi.
- SLA monitoring tidak ada — manajer tidak tahu rata-rata response time
  per unit/kategori. `mail_respontime` tabel ada di legacy tapi tidak
  pernah di-aggregate jadi report.
- Print verification (QR) ada di legacy 8 tahun (95k record) tapi
  format `auth_code` 13-char `uniqid()` rawan collision (sudah 1 dup di
  data legacy), dan tidak ada audit trail siapa scan QR.

User butuh aplikasi baru yang:

1. Compatible dengan data legacy 1.8M+ mail tanpa damage.
2. Tampilkan status disposisi yang konsisten walau legacy tidak punya flag.
3. Manage personal folder dengan validasi sehat (depth, unique nama,
   delete-when-empty).
4. Tampilkan role/posisi user secara konsisten saat user dimutasi.
5. Report response time SLA yang accurate dari data lama + baru.
6. Print verification yang reliable (16-char UUID), backward compat lama
   pakai pesan netral bukan error.

## Solution

Spring Boot 4.0.4 mail-service (Java 25, MariaDB 11.4, Redis, JOOQ + JPA
CQRS-lite) yang **menggunakan schema legacy apa adanya** + derive semantik
yang dibutuhkan dari kombinasi kolom existing.

Penekanan: **convention atas schema-change**. Status disposisi, role
sender, response report — semua di-derive di service layer, bukan dari
kolom baru.

## User Stories

### Disposisi & Status (FE-derived)

1. As a staf admin, I want to see "Status disposisi: Selesai" pada child mail yang sudah saya forward, so that saya tahu task itu sudah saya tangani walau legacy tidak punya flag.
2. As a manajer, I want to see "Belum direspons" pada disposisi yang saya kirim ke staf yang belum forward/reply, so that saya bisa follow-up manual.
3. As a user, I want subject child mail otomatis prefix "Fwd:", so that mudah saya bedakan thread reply vs root.
4. As a user, I want melihat thread cascading 8-10 level (root → atasan → … → staf) tanpa truncate, so that visibility full.
5. As a user, I want melihat "MailEntry status: Read/Unread" dari sudut pandang penerima, so that konsisten dengan inbox legacy.
6. As a user, I want deadline `m_max_response_date` ditampilkan kalau ada (11% mail), tapi tidak ada badge "Overdue" otomatis, so that tidak overflow noise dari 89% mail tanpa deadline.

### Role-in-Context

7. As a user yang baru dimutasi, I want sesi saya tetap aktif walau posisi berubah, so that tidak perlu re-login (cache HR auto-invalidate).
8. As a user, I want melihat sender mail history dengan format "Nama Orang (posisi terkini)", so that saya tahu pengirim siapa walau posisi sudah berbeda.
9. As a user, I want melihat recipient mail history dengan `pos_name` snapshot legacy, so that audit historis recipient terjaga.
10. As a sistem admin, I want signature pejabat di-pick runtime dari posisi aktif user saat sign + immutable di blob mail history, so that signature lama tetap historis walau user pindah posisi.
11. As a user dengan draft yang belum terkirim saat dimutasi, I want draft saya pakai posisi BARU saat dikirim, so that konsisten dengan mutasi.
12. As a user dengan disposisi belum diproses saat dimutasi, I want mail tetap ada di Inbox saya (bukan auto-takeover atasan baru), so that saya bisa manual handover.

### Personal Folder

13. As a user, I want bisa create personal folder up to depth 3, so that bisa imitasi struktur path "2024 / Q1 / pengadaan".
14. As a user, I want validasi nama folder unique per parent + max 45 char, so that tidak ada konflik nama dalam 1 parent.
15. As a user, I want delete folder di-block kalau berisi mail/subfolder, so that tidak ada kehilangan akses ke mail saya.
16. As a user, I want move mail dari INBOX/READ ke personal folder (via `user_task.folder_id` update), so that saya bisa organize manual.
17. As a user, I want NOT bisa move mail dari Draft/Sent/Deleted/Purged ke personal folder, so that integritas folder system terjaga.
18. As a user, I want SystemFolder (INBOX, READ, SENT, DRAFT, DELETED, PURGED, ROOT, PERSONAL_ROOT) tidak bisa di-rename/delete, so that hardcoded enum tidak rusak.

### Response Time SLA

19. As a manajer, I want melihat report rata-rata response time per (mail_type, mail_category) dari `mail_respontime`, so that bisa benchmark performa unit.
20. As a manajer, I want report response time per unit pengirim (resolve via HR live), dengan caveat "data live, bukan saat surat dikirim", so that saya paham bias data.
21. As a manajer, I want first-reply-wins tracking (hanya child pertama yang di-record), so that response time terhitung dari interaksi awal saja.
22. As a manajer, I want forward "Fwd:" tetap di-count sebagai response, so that konsisten dengan legacy (tidak ada flag reply-vs-forward).
23. As a sistem, I want negative duration (clock skew) di-skip, so that tidak ada record invalid.
24. As a manajer, I want NOT ada cron breach detection (tidak ada notif "Overdue"), so that tidak overflow noise dari 89% mail tanpa deadline.

### Print Verification

25. As a user, I want generate auth_code 16-char UUID hex saat cetak, so that lebih kuat dari legacy 13-char `uniqid()` (yang sudah ada 1 collision).
26. As a publik scanner, I want endpoint `GET /api/mails/verify-sign/{authCode}` mengembalikan {valid, mailNumber, subject, printDate, printedBy, ipAddress}, so that bisa verify dokumen tanpa login.
27. As a sistem, I want capture client IP via X-Forwarded-For chain saat cetak, so that audit log lengkap (terima null + varchar(32) untuk legacy compat).
28. As a publik scanner yang scan QR dokumen pre-migrasi (auth_code 13-char), I want pesan netral "Dokumen pre-migrasi, hubungi arsip", so that tidak bocor info "tidak valid".
29. As a publik scanner yang scan QR dokumen yang mail-nya sudah soft-deleted, I want response invalid dengan pesan netral, so that tidak ada 500 error (saat ini bug — `EntityNotFoundException` lolos ke client).
30. As a sistem, I want endpoint verify rate-limited 30 req/menit/IP (Bucket4j atau Redis token bucket), so that brute-force enumeration auth_code di-mitigasi.
31. As a sistem, I want NO backfill 95k legacy print_log, so that QR di kertas lama mati (acceptable trade-off — user diedukasi).
32. As a sistem, I want username field varchar(128) simpan `principal.name()` snapshot, so that audit log tetap valid post-resignation.

### Migrasi Data

33. As a sistem, I want preserve schema 6 tabel inti apa adanya, so that 1.8M+ baris bisa di-migrate tanpa column-add risk.
34. As a developer, I want Flyway V15-V30 migration sudah pre-flight pada staging, so that 0 orphans/duplicates terjamin.
35. As a developer, I want entity Java rename via `@Column(name="...")` annotation, so that schema legacy tidak perlu ALTER.
36. As a developer, I want skip backfill yang tidak applicable (legacy print_log 95k, mail_respontime kalau kosong), so that risiko data rewrite minimum.

## Implementation Decisions

### Modul / Komponen

**Read path (JOOQ)**:
- `MailQueryService` — derive status disposisi via tree traversal (parent_id, child existence), bukan dari kolom flag.
- `MailFolderQueryService` — derive counter badge, depth check.
- `MailResponseTimeQueryService` — aggregat AVG/MIN/MAX/P50/P95 per (type, category) + per unit (live HR resolve).
- `MailSignatureVerificationService` (read-only) — lookup auth_code → return `MailSignatureVerificationResponse`.

**Write path (JPA)**:
- `MailCommandService` — handle create/forward/archive. Numbering via `MailNumberGeneratorDelegator` (Default/BMS/SMD/BPN strategy).
- `MailFolderCommandService` — create/rename/delete folder + validasi depth/unique/empty.
- `MailSignatureService.signMail(mailId, principal)` — generate auth_code (16-char UUID hex), capture IP via X-Forwarded-For, persist `PrintLog`.
- `UserTaskCommandService` — move mail ke personal folder via `user_task.folder_id` update.

**Event/Async**:
- `MailSentEvent` → `MailResponseTimeListener` (existing) — first-reply-wins tracking.
- `ArchivePublishedEvent` → `ArchivePublishedEventListener` (sudah ada bug, di-track `mail-service-a3s`).
- `EmployeePositionChangedEvent` (proposed, future) — webhook dari HR untuk invalidate `hrEmployee` cache.

**Master/lookup**:
- `MailPrincipal.activePosId` di-resolve runtime dari `employee.emp_pos_id` (cache `hrEmployee` 60m).
- `signature_pejabat` lookup → render signature image ke PDF blob immutable.

### Schema (no change)

Tabel inti tetap apa adanya. Hanya mapping entity:
- `print_log.date` → `PrintLog.printDate` via `@Column(name="date")`.
- `mail_recipient.pos_name` (varchar 64) sebagai snapshot recipient (sudah ada).
- `mail.m_created_by_name` (varchar 64) sebagai snapshot sender nama.
- Tidak ada penambahan kolom: `is_breached`, `escalated_at`, `signed_hash`, `cert_serial`, `pos_snapshot_at_send`, dst.

### API Contract

**Disposisi/Mail**:
- Status disposisi tidak punya endpoint khusus; di-derive di response DTO `MailEntryResponse.statusDisposisi` enum {SELESAI, BELUM_RESPONS, …}.
- `GET /api/mails/{id}` return tree dengan `derivedStatus`, `m_created_by_name`, `pos_name (resolve runtime)`.

**Folder**:
- `POST /api/mail-folders` validasi: depth ≤ 3, nama unique per (owner_id, parent_id), 45 char.
- `DELETE /api/mail-folders/{id}` block 409 jika berisi mail/subfolder.
- `PATCH /api/user-tasks/{id}/folder` move mail (source folder must be INBOX(2)/READ(4) only).

**Verify**:
- `GET /api/mails/verify-sign/{authCode}` (PUBLIC, rate-limited 30 req/menit/IP):
  - 200 valid: `{valid: true, mailId, mailNumber, subject, printDate, printedBy, ipAddress}`.
  - 200 invalid: `{valid: false, message: "..."}` — TIDAK 404, TIDAK 500.
  - Untuk auth_code 13-char (legacy uniqid): `{valid: false, message: "Dokumen pre-migrasi, hubungi arsip"}`.
  - Untuk mail soft-deleted: `{valid: false, message: "Dokumen tidak tersedia"}`.

**Report SLA**:
- `GET /api/reports/response-time?type=...&category=...&from=...&to=...` → AVG/MIN/MAX/P50/P95.
- `GET /api/reports/response-time/by-unit?from=...&to=...` → group by HR-resolved pos_id, dengan disclaimer di response header `X-Report-Caveat: live-position`.

### Architectural Decisions

- **CQRS-lite**: setiap modul split JPA write + JOOQ read. Konsisten dengan codebase existing.
- **Soft delete**: `@SQLRestriction("status != 'DELETED'")` aktif di Mail. Konsekuensi: print_log lookup yang ke-restrict bisa throw `EntityNotFoundException` → tangani di `MailSignatureService.verifySignature` dengan `findByIdIgnoreSqlRestriction` atau native query yang bypass restriction.
- **Tenant**: single instance via `TenantConfig` (`app.tenant.*`).
- **Caching**: Redis — `hrEmployee` 60m (auto-invalidate via webhook future), `mailFolder` 10m, `tenantConfig` 6h, `mailStats` 5m.
- **Numbering**: per-(YEAR, category) scope confirmed dari validasi data legacy (memory `mail-seq-scope-verified`). Bug `COUNT(*)` → `MAX(parsed_seq)` perlu fix (existing beads `mail-service-s31`).
- **Auth**: AppWrite JWT → `AppWriteAuthFilter` → `MailPrincipal`.
- **No crypto signature di MVP**: print-verification only. Future BSrE/PrivyID butuh schema baru → approval eksplisit.

### Migration

- Flyway V15-V30 migration sudah dikelompok di plan24-issues (memory). Pre-flight pada staging (V14) → 0 orphans, 0 duplicates.
- Backfill skip untuk: legacy `print_log` 95k, `mail_respontime` (kalau kosong di legacy verify dulu).
- Dependency chain: V15→V16→V17 (mail FK); V18→V19 (recipient); V17→V22 (usertask).

## Testing Decisions

**SKIPPED for this PRD per user direction.** Implementor decides testing
strategy at implementation time. (Saran umum: unit test untuk derived
logic seperti tree traversal status disposisi, integration test untuk
verify endpoint public + rate-limit, repo test untuk numbering generator
race condition via `SELECT FOR UPDATE`.)

## Out of Scope

- Crypto digital signature (BSrE/PrivyID/PKI). Future, butuh schema change.
- Cron/scheduler untuk SLA breach detection (89% mail tanpa deadline → noise).
- Backfill 95k legacy print_log (QR lama dimatikan; user diedukasi).
- Permission matrix per posisi / capability matrix (semua user dapat aksi sama, kecuali `MailArchiveAccess`).
- Role-switcher UI / header `X-Active-Role-Id` (1 user = 1 posisi aktif, single source HR).
- Auto-rules / filter folder ("kalau pengirim X masuk folder Y" — manual move only).
- Audit log "siapa scan verify QR" (verify endpoint readonly, no log).
- Auto-takeover disposisi saat user mutasi (manual handover).
- Auto-notif atasan baru saat user mutasi punya mail in-flight.
- Multi-signer / approval berjenjang dengan signature.
- Personal folder rule engine (label-style multi-folder membership).
- Snapshot kolom baru di `mail` untuk sender pos/org (no schema change).
- "Recently viewed" / counter "Overdue" badge.

## Further Notes

**Memory yang relevan (jangan duplikasi)**:
- `legacy-disposisi-no-completion-flag` — status disposisi emergent dari tree.
- `mail-seq-scope-verified` — numbering per-(YEAR, category).
- `cache-redis-pada-cacheconfig` — fix cache cast bug (separate plan).
- `plan24-issues` — 24 beads issues + GH #31-#54 untuk schema alignment.
- `pre-flight-script-v15-v30-run-on-staging` — V15-V30 sudah di-validate.

**Dependent open beads**:
- `mail-service-a3s` (P1): Fix `ArchivePublishedEventListener` (wrong table, missing pos→user, missing notif fan-out).
- `mail-service-s31` (P1): Fix numbering placeholder bugs di `AbstractMailNumberGenerator`.
- `mail-service-lfe` (P3): Rate-limit `/api/mails/verify-sign/{code}`.
- (TBD) Soft-deleted mail edge case di verify endpoint (perlu di-create kalau belum).

**Open questions belum terjawab** (akan di-resolve saat implementation):
- Plt: `employee.emp_pos_id` di-update langsung atau ada `employee_assignment` tabel terpisah? Konfirmasi tim HR.
- Personal folder migrasi: 609 folder dengan `folder_status=3` legacy → skip atau migrate as DELETED?
- Backfill `mail_respontime` legacy: ada data atau perlu rebuild? Cek count.
- Filter "Fwd:" dari report SLA: heuristik subject `LIKE 'Fwd:%'` atau biarkan?
- Report range default: bulan / quarter / tahun?
- Cache HR invalidation event: webhook protocol (HTTP POST / Kafka / Redis pub-sub)?
- Audit historis sender (legal/audit query): apakah pakai `snapshot_employee` legacy + reconstruct timestamp, atau accept "live only"?
- Counter badge personal folder: total saja, atau juga unread?
- Crypto signature vendor: BSrE (BSSN gratis) vs PrivyID (berbayar)? Belum saatnya, tapi catat untuk future.

**Caveat dokumentasi**:
- CONTEXT.md (1424 baris) berisi detail tata kelola lengkap.
- `BUSINESS_LOGIC_IMPLEMENTATION.md` untuk numbering, threading, signatures, tracking.
- `memory.md` (root) untuk B1-B10 critical issues.

title: Add pos/org snapshot columns to Mail entity for role-context audit
description:
Mail entity (id.perumdamts.mail.entity.core.Mail) saat ini hanya menyimpan m_created_by (user id) dan m_created_by_name. Tidak ada snapshot posisi & unit organisasi pengirim saat compose/forward.

WHY: Sesuai keputusan grilling Role-in-context UX (CONTEXT.md), tampilan history mail harus snapshot — saat user dimutasi dari Staf ke Manajer, mail lama tetap menampilkan 'Staf <unit>' bukan 'Manajer'. Saat ini snapshot pos_name hanya ada di mail_recipient (untuk recipient), bukan di Mail itu sendiri (untuk sender). Tanpa kolom ini, tampilan sender role di mail history harus query master employee runtime + mengaburkan history setelah mutasi.

WHAT:
- Tambah kolom di tabel mail (Flyway migration baru, mis. V35):
  * m_created_by_pos_id INT NULL
  * m_created_by_pos_name VARCHAR(64) NULL
  * m_created_by_org_id INT NULL
- Tambah field di Mail.java entity dengan @Column matching.
- Update MailCommandService.create() untuk set 3 field tsb dari MailPrincipal.activePosId/activePosName/activeOrgId saat pertama kali persist.
- Update disposisi (forward) write path supaya child mail snapshot posisi forwarder saat itu.
- Backfill: untuk 1.8M legacy mail, isi dari join ke employee/position by m_created_by → pakai posisi terkini employee saat migrasi (best-effort, tidak ideal tapi acceptable karena legacy tidak punya snapshot historical).
- MailPrincipal harus expose activePosId/activePosName/activeOrgId. Resolve dari HrServiceClient (cache hrEmployee 60m) saat principal dibangun di AppWriteAuthFilter.

ACCEPTANCE:
- Mail baru yang dibuat punya 3 kolom snapshot terisi.
- Mail history yang ditampilkan setelah user mutasi tetap menunjukkan posisi lama.
- Migration V35 tidak break existing data (kolom NULL acceptable untuk pre-snapshot history).
- Test: MailCommandServiceTest.create_setsPosSnapshot.
close_reason: Ditolak: hard constraint user — schema mail tidak boleh berubah supaya migrasi 1.8M baris aman. Sender role di-resolve runtime via m_created_by → employee → position. Konsekuensi: posisi sender di history tidak historis (asimetris dengan recipient yang sudah snapshot di mail_recipient.pos_name). Diterima sebagai trade-off zero-migration-risk. Lihat CONTEXT.md section Role-in-context UX.

title: [migrate] V22 sys_user_task cleanup 57 orphan + FK
description:
## Konteks
Plan: section 4.5 & 5 (V22). `sys_user_task` (4M rows) schema sudah match entity. Hanya perlu cleanup 57 orphan + FK `tm_id` ke `mail.m_id`. **`folder_id` TIDAK di-FK** karena sentinel `-1` (PURGED).

## Tabel target
- `sys_user_task` (4,004,381 rows)

## Pre-flight check
```sql
SELECT COUNT(*) AS orphan FROM sys_user_task
WHERE tm_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);
-- Expected ~57

SELECT COUNT(*) AS purged FROM sys_user_task WHERE folder_id = -1;
-- Expected ~44,289 — folder_id=-1 dibiarkan, tidak di-FK
```

## SQL DDL — Flyway V22

File: `src/main/resources/db/migration/V22__sys_user_task_cleanup_and_fk.sql`

```sql
-- Backup orphan
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sys_user_task_orphan_backup_20260504 AS
SELECT * FROM sys_user_task WHERE tm_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);

DELETE FROM sys_user_task WHERE tm_id NOT IN (SELECT m_id FROM mail);

ALTER TABLE sys_user_task
  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_usertask_mail
    FOREIGN KEY (tm_id) REFERENCES mail(m_id)
    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;

-- folder_id TIDAK di-FK (sentinel -1 = PURGED).
-- Lihat plan section 4.5 untuk plan-26 opsional pindah row purged ke tabel terpisah.
```

## Entity diff
File: `entity/core/UserTask.java`

Pastikan ada konstanta sentinel:
```java
public static final int FOLDER_PURGED = -1;
```

(opsional) Tambah enum `SystemFolder` di `enums/`:
```java
public enum SystemFolder {
    INBOX(1), SENT(2), DRAFT(3), TRASH(4), STARRED(5), ARCHIVE(6),
    PERSONAL_ROOT(10), PURGED(-1);
    private final int id;
    // ...
}
```

## Files yang harus diaudit
- `entity/core/UserTask.java` — tambah konstanta PURGED
- `enums/SystemFolder.java` (opsional)
- `service/.../UserTaskQueryService` — pastikan filter `folder_id <> -1` untuk normal queries
- `repository/.../jooq/UserTaskQueryRepository` — query yang exclude purged

## Langkah pengerjaan
1. Pre-flight: konfirmasi 57 orphan + 44k purged.
2. Backup orphan.
3. Buat Flyway V22.
4. Run di staging, verifikasi FK `fk_usertask_mail`.
5. Tambah konstanta `FOLDER_PURGED` di entity.
6. Audit semua query UserTask: filter `folder_id <> -1` di list normal.
7. Run test: `./gradlew test --tests "*UserTask*"`.
8. Smoke test inbox/sent/trash list.

## Rollback
```sql
ALTER TABLE sys_user_task DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_usertask_mail;
INSERT INTO sys_user_task SELECT * FROM sys_user_task_orphan_backup_20260504;
```

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Pre-flight: 57 orphan, 44k purged
- [ ] Backup ada
- [ ] V22 apply clean
- [ ] FK `fk_usertask_mail` ada
- [ ] Konstanta `FOLDER_PURGED = -1` ada
- [ ] Query UserTask normal exclude purged
- [ ] Smoke test pass

## Blocked by
- bd V17 (mail FK) — wajib mail FK dulu, baru sys_user_task FK

title: [migrate] V19 mail_recipient dedupe + unique + FK
description:
## Konteks
Plan: section 4.2 & 5 (V19). Setelah V18 cleanup orphan, lakukan dedupe `(mail_id, user_id)`, tambah unique constraint, lalu FK ke `mail.m_id`.

## Tabel target
- `mail_recipient`

## Pre-flight check
```sql
SELECT COUNT(*) AS dups FROM (
  SELECT mail_id, user_id FROM mail_recipient
    GROUP BY mail_id, user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) x;
-- Catat angka — akan jadi jumlah row yang di-DELETE di dedupe
```

## SQL DDL — Flyway V19

File: `src/main/resources/db/migration/V19__mail_recipient_dedupe_and_fk.sql`

```sql
-- Step 1: backup duplikat untuk audit
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mail_recipient_dup_backup_20260504 AS
SELECT mr.* FROM mail_recipient mr
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT mail_id, user_id FROM mail_recipient
    GROUP BY mail_id, user_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) d ON d.mail_id = mr.mail_id AND d.user_id = mr.user_id;

-- Step 2: dedupe — keep MIN(id)
DELETE mr1 FROM mail_recipient mr1
INNER JOIN mail_recipient mr2
  ON mr1.mail_id = mr2.mail_id
 AND mr1.user_id = mr2.user_id
 AND mr1.id > mr2.id;

-- Step 3: unique + FK
ALTER TABLE mail_recipient
  ADD CONSTRAINT uq_recipient_mail_user UNIQUE (mail_id, user_id),
  ADD CONSTRAINT fk_recipient_mail
    FOREIGN KEY (mail_id) REFERENCES mail(m_id)
    ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;
```

## Entity diff
File: `entity/core/MailRecipient.java`

```diff
+ @Table(name = "mail_recipient",
+   uniqueConstraints = @UniqueConstraint(name = "uq_recipient_mail_user",
+     columnNames = {"mail_id", "user_id"}))
```

## Files yang harus diaudit
- `entity/core/MailRecipient.java`
- `service/.../MailRecipientService` — saat add recipient, handle duplicate (catch `DataIntegrityViolationException` atau use `ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE` di JOOQ)
- Test fixture: pastikan tidak ada test yang sengaja insert duplikat

## Langkah pengerjaan
1. Pre-flight: catat jumlah duplikat.
2. Run Flyway V19 di staging.
3. Verifikasi unique + FK.
4. Update entity dengan `@UniqueConstraint`.
5. Update service add-recipient untuk handle constraint violation gracefully.
6. Run test: `./gradlew test --tests "*Recipient*"`.
7. Smoke test: kirim mail ke user yang sudah pernah recipient → tidak duplicate, juga tidak error.

## Rollback
```sql
ALTER TABLE mail_recipient
  DROP FOREIGN KEY fk_recipient_mail,
  DROP INDEX uq_recipient_mail_user;
INSERT INTO mail_recipient SELECT * FROM mail_recipient_dup_backup_20260504;
```

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Pre-flight dup count tercatat
- [ ] Backup duplikat ada
- [ ] V19 apply clean
- [ ] Unique `uq_recipient_mail_user` ada
- [ ] FK `fk_recipient_mail` ada
- [ ] Service handle duplicate gracefully
- [ ] Smoke test pass

## Blocked by
- bd V18 (recipient cleanup)

title: [migrate] V18 mail_recipient is_notified + cleanup 37k orphan
description:
## Konteks
Plan: section 4.2 & 5 (V18). `mail_recipient` (2.2M rows): drop entity field redundant, ADD `is_notified` di DB, cleanup 37k orphan, backfill `is_notified`.

```sql
ALTER TABLE pesan_singkat
  ADD COLUMN status ENUM('ACTIVE','INACTIVE') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
  ADD COLUMN is_deleted TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  ADD COLUMN updated_date DATETIME NULL;
```

```diff
+
+ @UpdateTimestamp
```

`@SQLRestriction("is_deleted = 0")`.

```java
ctx.selectFrom(PESAN_SINGKAT)
   .where(DSL.condition("MATCH({0}) AGAINST ({1} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE)",

   .and(PESAN_SINGKAT.IS_DELETED.eq((byte)0))

```

```sql
  ADD COLUMN is_deleted TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER status_new;

UPDATE jenis_dokumen SET
  status_new = CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE 'INACTIVE' END,
  is_deleted = CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;
```

title: [entity-new] MessageTemplate (msg_template)
description:
## Konteks
Entity baru `MessageTemplate` map ke `msg_template` (13 rows). Plan section 6.2 & 9.3.

> **DEPENDENCY:** OQ-4 (issue #2) — verifikasi apakah `msg_template` overlap dengan `pesan_singkat`. Jika overlap → consolidate ke 1 entity. Jika beda → 2 entity.

## Tabel target
- `msg_template`

Schema (asumsi):
```
template_id INT PK
message TEXT
description VARCHAR(128)
created_at DATETIME (V30)
updated_at DATETIME (V30)
```

## Files yang dibuat
- `entity/master/MessageTemplate.java`
- `repository/master/jpa/MessageTemplateRepository.java`
- `repository/master/jooq/MessageTemplateQueryRepository.java`
- `service/master/MessageTemplateCommandService.java`, `MessageTemplateQueryService.java`

- `controller/master/MessageTemplateController.java`

## Entity skeleton
```java
@Entity
@Table(name = "msg_template")
@Getter @Setter @NoArgsConstructor
public class MessageTemplate {
    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
    @Column(name = "template_id")
    private Integer id;

    @Column(name = "message", columnDefinition = "TEXT")
    private String message;

    @Column(name = "description", length = 128)
    private String description;

    @CreationTimestamp @Column(name = "created_at", updatable = false)
    private LocalDateTime createdAt;
    @UpdateTimestamp @Column(name = "updated_at")

}
```

## API endpoints (jika decide bukan overlap dengan QuickMessage)
- `GET /api/master/message-template` — list
- `GET /api/master/message-template/{id}` — detail (dengan Sqids)

## Langkah pengerjaan
1. Tunggu OQ-4 RESOLVED + V30.
2. Jika OQ-4 = OVERLAP → BATAL issue ini, consolidate ke `QuickMessage` (issue baru).
3. Jika OQ-4 = SEPARATE → buat entity + full CRUD stack.
4. Smoke test CRUD via API.

title: [entity-new] MailResponseTime (mail_respontime)
[entity-new] MailArchiveNotifLog (mail_archive_notif_log)
[entity-new] MailArchiveNotif (mail_archive_notif)
[migrate] V30 audit columns ke 6 tabel legacy unmapped
description:
## Konteks
Plan: section 5 (V30). 6 tabel legacy belum punya entity di mail-service. Sebelum entity dibuat (issue #19-#24), tambah audit columns (`created_at`, `updated_at`) ke 6 tabel ini agar konsisten dengan tabel lain.

## Tabel target
- `mail_archive_notif` (40,922 rows)
- `mail_archive_notif_log` (336,560 rows)
- `mail_respontime` (233,449 rows)
- `mail_org_statistic` (5,724 rows)
- `mail_category_statistic` (5,020 rows)
- `msg_template` (13 rows)

## Pre-flight check
```sql
-- Verifikasi tabel ada + count
SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_ROWS, ENGINE FROM information_schema.TABLES
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME IN ('mail_archive_notif','mail_archive_notif_log',
                     'mail_respontime','mail_org_statistic',
                     'mail_category_statistic','msg_template');
```

## SQL DDL — Flyway V30

File: `src/main/resources/db/migration/V30__legacy_unmapped_tables_audit_columns.sql`

```sql
-- Helper: setiap tabel ditambah created_at / updated_at jika belum ada
-- Cara cek manual via SHOW COLUMNS sebelum apply

-- mail_archive_notif (sudah punya insert_date / processed_date — skip)
-- Tetapi tambah updated_at untuk konsistensi
ALTER TABLE mail_archive_notif
  ADD COLUMN updated_at DATETIME NULL AFTER processed_date;
UPDATE mail_archive_notif SET updated_at = COALESCE(processed_date, insert_date) WHERE updated_at IS NULL;

-- mail_archive_notif_log (sudah punya notif_date)
ALTER TABLE mail_archive_notif_log
  ADD COLUMN created_at DATETIME NULL AFTER notif_date,
  ADD COLUMN updated_at DATETIME NULL AFTER created_at;
UPDATE mail_archive_notif_log SET created_at = notif_date, updated_at = notif_date WHERE created_at IS NULL;

-- mail_respontime (sudah punya orig_date / reply_date — skip created)
ALTER TABLE mail_respontime
  ADD COLUMN created_at DATETIME NULL,
  ADD COLUMN updated_at DATETIME NULL;
UPDATE mail_respontime SET
  created_at = COALESCE(reply_date, orig_date),
  updated_at = COALESCE(reply_date, orig_date)
  WHERE created_at IS NULL;

-- mail_org_statistic
ALTER TABLE mail_org_statistic
  ADD COLUMN created_at DATETIME NULL,
  ADD COLUMN updated_at DATETIME NULL;
UPDATE mail_org_statistic SET created_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE created_at IS NULL;

-- mail_category_statistic
ALTER TABLE mail_category_statistic
  ADD COLUMN created_at DATETIME NULL,
  ADD COLUMN updated_at DATETIME NULL;
UPDATE mail_category_statistic SET created_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE created_at IS NULL;

-- msg_template
ALTER TABLE msg_template
  ADD COLUMN created_at DATETIME NULL,
  ADD COLUMN updated_at DATETIME NULL;
UPDATE msg_template SET created_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE created_at IS NULL;
```

> Catatan: cek `SHOW COLUMNS FROM <table>` dulu sebelum ADD untuk menghindari error "duplicate column name" jika sudah ada.

## Entity diff
Tidak ada entity baru di V30 ini — entity dibuat di issue #19-#24 setelah V30 jalan.

## Files yang harus diaudit
Tidak ada Java change.

## Langkah pengerjaan
1. Pre-flight: konfirmasi 6 tabel exist + row counts.
2. Backup tiap tabel: `CREATE TABLE <name>_backup_20260504 AS SELECT * FROM <name>;`
3. Cek `SHOW COLUMNS` setiap tabel untuk pastikan kolom audit belum ada. Sesuaikan SQL kalau perlu.
4. Buat Flyway V30.
5. Run di staging, verifikasi.

## Rollback
```sql
ALTER TABLE mail_archive_notif DROP COLUMN updated_at;
ALTER TABLE mail_archive_notif_log DROP COLUMN created_at, DROP COLUMN updated_at;
ALTER TABLE mail_respontime DROP COLUMN created_at, DROP COLUMN updated_at;
ALTER TABLE mail_org_statistic DROP COLUMN created_at, DROP COLUMN updated_at;
ALTER TABLE mail_category_statistic DROP COLUMN created_at, DROP COLUMN updated_at;
ALTER TABLE msg_template DROP COLUMN created_at, DROP COLUMN updated_at;
```

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Backup ada untuk 6 tabel
- [ ] V30 apply clean
- [ ] 6 tabel punya `created_at`/`updated_at` (sesuai SQL)
- [ ] Existing row populated
- [ ] Tidak ada error duplicate column name

## Blocked by
- bd #1 (preflight)
